programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: To run through a vertical obstacle course. Contestants will put their head inside the box with 24 rats. To cross a plank suspend between to speeding semi-trucks.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Celebrity 2. To move flags from one open window across and around the outside of a building. To separate and move white snakes out of a group of green. To escape from a submerged cage and swim to a life ring.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants enter the water where there is a 30-yard long tunnel. Unhatched duck's embryo boiled 30 minutes and then served. Contestants must ride a bicycle across a 10" wide plank that is suspended between two buildings.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: To jump from moving helicopter onto a floating platform. Place 60 pink toed tarantulas into torture hat and stay still for 3 minutes. The contestant lies in a plexi-glass tube as water is pumped in.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: To stand naked in public. Contestants have to eat 0-5 live Madagascar hissing cockroaches. Players are wrapped in heavy chain around their ankles and submerged into a tank of water.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: To gather as many flags as possible. To play a game of pool and eat the assigned items. To run across shipping containers planting flags.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: To jump from one roof to the other roof. To search for and eat coagulated blood balls hidden in earthworms. To escape from a submerged fuselage.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Clip show of the greatest moments from Season 2.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: To unlock the Fear Factor straight-jacket the quickest. To gather the most flags the fastest.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: To Swim with Alligators. Spin on a turntable and eat the assigned buffet. Players need to make their way through the inside of a runaway Tanker Truck to retrieve a key and unlock the box.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Everyone knows Bigfoot, an enormous truck that crushes everything in its path. Contestant descends into 10-foot high tank filled with water and ribbon snakes. Suspended from a 40 ton crane hangs a clear Plexiglas box.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan helps a terminally ill boy and his mother. Meanwhile, Mark deals with a thief abandoned by his folks.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark help aging movie heroes to stand up to a street gang known as Satan's Helpers. They persuade a young boxer not to throw a big fight when the gang tries to bully him.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark assist a young country singer who is hoping to follow in her mother's footsteps. Next, they help a widow mourning her late husband.

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: The angels help an estranged mother and daughter reconcile after a painful family secret is revealed

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: Monica must expose a charismatic cult leader as an evil fraud before he pushes his followers to self-destruction

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: The angels help a bitter Vietnam veteran come to terms with his painful past, on touched by an angel

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: The angels must prevent a talented young boxer from using his boxing skills against his enemies

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Dr. Mike, Sully and Brian must deal with the town’s prejudice when a black child tries to attend the all-white school.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Dr. Mike’s patients begin dying mysteriously.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Brian suffers a crisis of faith when the Rev. Johnson is stricken with progressive blindness at Christmas time, despite the healing efforts of Dr. Mike.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: When Sully opposes the building of a dam, he finds himself on the other side of the law and behind bars.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan helps the residents of Havencrest, when they learn that the retirement home is going to be sold. Jonathan must reveal his real identity to Mark in order to complete the assignment.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan helps a terminally ill boy and his mother. Meanwhile, Mark deals with a thief abandoned by his folks.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark help aging movie heroes to stand up to a street gang known as Satan's Helpers. They persuade a young boxer not to throw a big fight when the gang tries to bully him.

programme.title: American Ninja
programme.desc: Michael Dudikoff stars as Joe Armstrong, a one-man fighting machine. Serving in the army to avoid prison, Joe finds himself battling the deadly Black Star Order, as well as corrupt military leaders in order to bring down an illegal arms sale.

programme.title: American Ninja 2: The Confrontation
programme.desc: On a remote Caribbean island, Army Ranger Joe Armstrong saves an old friend from the clutches of "The Lion," an evil super-criminal who has kidnapped a local scientist and mass-produced an army of mutant Ninja warriors.

programme.title: American Ninja 3: Blood Hunt
programme.desc: Martial artist David Bradley takes the reins as Sean Davidson in this third installment of the wildly popular American Ninja franchise, teaming up with Steve James to battle a maniacal terrorist in yet another explosive action-packed adventure!

programme.title: American Ninja 4: The Annihilation
programme.desc: The American Ninja burst onto the screen in the fourth round of martial arts Action.

programme.title: Rage Of The Master
programme.desc: A kung fu school's master is killed by a disgruntled former student. Now a casino owner and the master's children seek out the help of Tiger Wong to get revenge.

programme.title: Kill Zone
programme.desc: An inspector and his unit are after a crime boss and are willing to capture him at all costs. The crime boss enlists his top henchmen to end their dirty schemes.

programme.title: Flash Point
programme.desc: The creators of Kill Zone take action to the next level with a breakthrough combination of hard-hitting mixed martial arts battles and nail-biting tension.

programme.title: Ip Man
programme.desc: Ip Man is the award-winning film adaptation about the life story of Ip Man, the grandmaster of the Wing Chun style of kung fu and sifu of legendary martial arts superstar, Bruce Lee.

programme.title: Rebelde sin cocina
programme.desc: Rebelde sin Cocina ha sido invitado a aparecer en el mercado de agricultores de Leslieville. Se le pidió que creara un menú con ingredientes de proveedores locales.

programme.title: Rebelde sin cocina
programme.desc: Después de casi un año de aparecer por la ciudad, un compañero vendedor de alimentos se acercó a FG para comprar un camión de comida. FG considera a Dom, un amigo de toda la vida y un tipo de números, como un potencial inversor de la empresa.

programme.title: Rebelde sin cocina
programme.desc: FAME (Asociación de familias para la salud mental en todas partes) se acerca a FG para lanzar una ventana emergente benéfica ... en cuatro días.

programme.title: Rebelde sin cocina
programme.desc: FG está lanzando su camión en el corazón del distrito financiero de Toronto y espera que se presenten cientos de personas.

programme.title: Media hora y listo!
programme.desc: ¿Una cena marroquí en treinta minutos? Así es! Spencer Watts se inspira en platos marroquíes que son rápidos de hacer y audaces en su sabor.

programme.title: Media hora y listo!
programme.desc: El chef Spencer Watts ofrece sus consejos y trucos para una clásica cena de hamburguesas y papas fritas con un toque saludable.

programme.title: Media hora y listo!
programme.desc: Es noche de comida para llevar: ¡Tandoori!, el chef Spencer Watts prepara cinco platos indios rápidos y fáciles que toman poco tiempo, pero son muy buenos en sabor.

programme.title: Media hora y listo!
programme.desc: El chef Spencer Watts prepara una comida sana y abundante para cuatro personas que reduce el tiempo, sin sacrificar el sabor.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: The Secret Garden" es un romántico restaurante francés que está al borde de la quiebra. El chef Ramsay causa revuelo cuando sugiere cambiar la decoración fea, el menú y la cocina sucia.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: Lela's es un restaurante exclusivo que desesperadamente necesita más clientela.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: Sebastian's prepara comida congelada de un menú complejo y los meseros están más preocupados por las audiciones para sus papeles de actuación que por servir las comidas.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: El chef Ramsay visita el Finn McCool's manejado por una familia en Westhampton, Nueva York, y se enfrenta a un detestable jefe de cocina que resulta ser el hijo del propietario.

programme.title: A bocados: Episodio 22
programme.desc: Receta: bolitas de patata y queso con confitura de tomate. Teodoro Bergara, cultivador de tomate de Falces. Vacas de Teodoro Bergara. Sección ¿truco o reto?: valor calórico de distintos quesos.

programme.title: A bocados: Episodio 24
programme.desc: Receta: salmón a la plancha con piquillos confitados, patatas panaderas y salsa de ajos al horno. Plantación de pimientos del piquillo en Lodosa. Sección ¿truco o reto? : cantidades de omega 3 en distintos alimentos.

programme.title: A bocados: Episodio 26
programme.desc: Receta: sopa de pescado. Puesto de venta de pescado en el Muelle de Lekeitio, Jonathan explica las características de la pescadilla, el salmonete, el verdel y el txitxarro.

programme.title: A bocados: Episodio 27
programme.desc: Receta: salteado de alubias, txipirones y setas. Plantaciónde alubia pinta alavesa de Pedro Fernandez de la Peña (Elburgo). Sección ¿truco o reto?: distinguir varios tipos de setas.

programme.title: Torres en la cocina
programme.desc: Humus Con Tomates y Anchoas, Pata Asada Canaria

programme.title: Torres en la cocina
programme.desc: Arroz de Chipirones en Conserva, Churros Con Chocolate (especial Navidad)

programme.title: Torres en la cocina
programme.desc: Alcachofas Con Foie, Redondo de Ternera

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1994, 19-year-old Shannon Melendi disappeared while at Emory University. Her disappearance remained a mystery for ten years, until new scientific testing cast a different light on Colvin "Butch" Hinton.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: On May 12, 1994, Crystal Perry was viciously murdered in her home in Bridgton, Maine. Michael Hutchinson, 32, was later found guilty in the slaying.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A human skeleton was discovered in the North Carolina marshlands. When investigators learned she'd been dead for 18 months, they knew it would be difficult to find out who she was, let alone who killed her.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Firefighters find an entire family dead inside their home in an apparent murder-suicide, but there are several inconsistent clues in the rubble. Could ballistics, a time card and some secret audiotapes unravel the mystery?

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When two women went missing and were later found brutally murdered, police wondered if they were victims of a hate crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a young woman disappeared, police feared she was the latest victim in a string of similar crimes. A pair of bloody gloves, unique tire tracks and ordinary pine needles provided investigators with some extraordinary clues.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: An aspiring model turned up dead and the prime suspect was her boyfriend. When he was eventually cleared, investigators had to dig deeper to find the perpetrator. With the help of a forensic geologist, they identified the most unlikely suspects.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The body of 16-year-old Leanne Tiernan was discovered nine months after she disappeared. Forensic scientists found clues that painted a virtual portrait of her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1984, California firefighters battled ten arson fires in three weeks. When cigarettes and a scrap of paper connected the case to similar fires further north, the hunt was on for a dangerous pyromaniac.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A neighbor watched as a man stabbed his wife, pushed her into the swimming pool and held her head under water. The husband, however, had no recollection of the crime. A jury would have to decide between evidence and the mysteries of the mind.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2000, the body of exotic dancer Rachel Siani was found beneath a New Jersey bridge. Investigators wondered if she had committed suicide. They discovered that Rachel offered to assist a drunk customer named John "Jack" Denofa to his motel room.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Professional photographer Charles Rathbun claims model Linda Sobek died during a consensual sexual encounter gone wrong, but Sobek's corpse and digital imaging tell a more sinister story.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1989, 4-year-old April Loveless was found dead in the backyard of her Texas home. Her parents told police that she was attacked and killed by wild dogs. Investigators did not agree.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: After 6-year-old Michelle Lee Dorr went missing, her father confessed to murdering her. But investigators soon poked holes in his story, leaving the case unsolved for 14 years.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A Michigan State University grad student disappeared and was presumed dead. With the help of a professor of geological sciences, police hoped to get the "dirt" on her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The 1996 investigation into 48-year-old Martha Hansen's murder is helped by a legal requirement that bars have video cameras installed on the premises.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A young woman is stabbed more than 100 times. The killer leaves DNA behind, but investigators must play a cat-and-mouse game to obtain a suspect's DNA to match.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When police recovered the submerged car of a missing man, they expected to find his body — but it wasn't there. The investigation that followed would uncover an obsession turned deadly.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When the wife of a well-known dentist is found dead, police struggle to identify a suspect. Some fibers and a study of the weather patterns on the night of the murder break the case open and reveal the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: An obstetrician returned home from the hospital and found his wife on the bathroom floor. She was covered with blood and not breathing. He tried unsuccessfully to revive her, staining his clothes with her blood in the process.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a woman disappeared without a trace, there were two possible explanations: kidnapping or murder. Careful investigation, a forensic artist and DNA profiling enabled police to find a single suspect, who was known to prey upon vulnerable women.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Timothy Wilson Spencer was identified as the man who raped and strangled five young women in Virginia. With the use of DNA profiling, an innocent man is freed and the real killer is convicted.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Police get a clue about a couple who disappeared on Memorial Day weekend during an in-progress robbery. The evidence found solves a brutal crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Residents of Noel, Missouri were stunned to learn that their bank had been robbed and the bank president was missing. His body was later found floating in a lake, securely bound to a chair with duct tape.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a successful stockbroker doesn't return home after a late shift, his wife reports him missing.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Even though their daughter had run away before, she had always come back. Her parents were sure this time would be no different, but they were wrong.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: This examination of the role autopsies play in murder investigations focuses on the suspicious death of Virginia Ridley. Police charge her mentally unstable husband with murder, but a medical examiner discovers that she died of natural causes.

programme.title: Forensic Files (embed)
programme.desc: After a Philadelphia Convention, 180 Legionnaires contract pneumonia-like symptoms and 29 of them die. The determination of one scientist helps identify the cause of this deadly disease.

programme.title: Forensic Files (embed)
programme.desc: On September 17, 1984, in a suburb of Tucson, Arizona, eight-year-old Vicki Hoskins left home on her pink bicycle to mail a letter for her mother. She never returned, but her slightly damaged bicycle was found nearby.

programme.title: Forensic Files (embed)
programme.desc: While skeet shooting on a beautiful spring day, Martin Dillon is shot dead. His friend maintains it was a freak accident, but it takes more than 20 years for the truth to surface.

programme.title: Forensic Files (embed)
programme.desc: In 1996, police received a call from Darlie Routier telling them of her two sons' murders. The police found the killer by analyzing blood spatter, doing behavioral profiling and analyzing Darlie's 911 call.

programme.title: Forensic Files (embed)
programme.desc: When Joann Katrinak is found dead in a corn field with her infant son, the obvious suspect is the husband and father of the victims. But insects found on the bodies reveal a vital clue which uncovers a twisted story of passion gone wrong.

programme.title: Forensic Files (embed)
programme.desc: After a Philadelphia Convention, 180 Legionnaires contract pneumonia-like symptoms and 29 of them die. The determination of one scientist helps identify the cause of this deadly disease.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Dino Thunder
programme.desc: Nikki Valentina, star of the most popular TV show, visits Reef side during filming of an episode of her show.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Dino Thunder
programme.desc: Trent accidentally bonds with the White Dino Gem, and becomes the White Dino Thunder Ranger.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Dino Thunder
programme.desc: The evil White Ranger finds his own Dragozord Dino Egg, and begins to bond it to him by feeding it energy from his Morpher.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Dino Thunder
programme.desc: Tommy discovers the identity of the White Ranger.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Dino Thunder
programme.desc: Realizing he is the White Ranger, Trent quits his job in an attempt to protect his friends.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Dino Thunder
programme.desc: A strange meteorite lands in the forest and its effects brings out repressed personality traits in anyone it comes in contact with.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Dino Thunder
programme.desc: Hayley hatches a plan using Insectolite to release the Zords stolen by Trent, but they show up too late. To their horror, they find that the Zords are now under the White Ranger's control!

programme.title: Power Rangers: Dino Thunder
programme.desc: While helping Tommy clean up his lab, Kira stumbles onto a secret bone.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Dino Thunder
programme.desc: A school bully sets his sights on Ethan. Meanwhile, Tommy discovers the true identity of Zeltrax.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Dino Thunder
programme.desc: Conner finds Ethan and Kira at their usual hangout enjoying the new satellite cable that Hayley has hooked up and is frustrated with them.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Dino Thunder
programme.desc: When Kira lands a new job as an intern on the Funky Fisherman cartoon show, Cassidy is dismayed to discover she was passed over.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Dino Thunder
programme.desc: As Anton Mercer explains to Trent that Mesogog was an experiment gone horribly wrong, Zeltrax creates the Copyotter to attack the city.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Dino Thunder
programme.desc: Zeltrax samples a portion of the new Evil White Ranger clone's energy and creates the White Terrorsaurus monster. With it, and the clone, he helps confuse the Power Rangers about their newest team member's loyalty.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Dino Thunder
programme.desc: When Kira's manager wants to shoot a music video with her, she feels compelled to compromise her style.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Dino Thunder
programme.desc: While Elsa works on her plan to shoot a powerful laser beam at Jupiter, Kira and Ethan help Cassidy land a job at the TV station.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Dino Thunder
programme.desc: Ethan takes an interest in deciphering the hieroglyphics of Egyptian ruler Tutenhawken, but not only jinxes himself, causing chaos at his every step, but frees the ancient evil from his multi-millennia-long slumber.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Dino Thunder
programme.desc: To help her mutant flower grow into the Thornox monster, Elsa uses a sample of a mysterious green slime. Meanwhile, Tommy attempts to use the same slime to demorph.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Dino Thunder
programme.desc: Tommy's invisibility problem is solved, but as a result, his Dino Gem is shattered, and he ends up in a coma!

programme.title: Power Rangers: Dino Thunder
programme.desc: Conner gets involved with an environmentalist campaign to save a hundred-year-old tree, all, so he can impress a girl named Krista.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Dino Thunder
programme.desc: Ethan's overly confident, and downright cocky attitude concerning his skills at playing the “Detonation Man” computer game begins to get on everyone's nerves. Meanwhile, Volcanologist Dr. Morton gets turned into a Horn-Rimmed Monster by Elsa.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Dino Thunder
programme.desc: Upon discovering that his days are numbered due to the fact two White Dino Thunder Rangers can't exist for much longer, the Evil White Ranger clone targets our heroes one last time.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Dino Thunder
programme.desc: A Dino Thunder/Ninja Storm crossover event: when the Abyss of Evil is opened, Lothor returns and casts a spell on Shane, Tori, and Dustin, turning them evil and setting them loose on Reefside.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Dino Thunder
programme.desc: In an attempt to help Shane, Tori, and Dustin, Cam goes to the Abyss of Evil with Hunter and Blake to retrieve the Power Coins.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Dino Thunder
programme.desc: Elsa begins to attack Elsa in her dreams.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Dino Thunder
programme.desc: Trent is given a magical pen, and accidentally pulls the Rangers into his comic book.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Dino Thunder
programme.desc: The Rangers discover the identities of Elsa and Mesogog.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Dino Thunder
programme.desc: Through a series of clips, Conner, Kira, and Ethan reminisce about how their lives have changed after becoming Power Rangers.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Dino Thunder

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: When Ricky makes a little money by selling his car, he forgets to tell his New York neighbors who drove out with him to Hollywood that he will buy their return train tickets.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy, unaccustomed to train travel, is sure her trip to New York will be filled with intrigue and romance. When she hears that a jewel thief is on board, she sees herself as the possible heroine of the situation despite Ricky's admonitions to leave.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: On their return from Hollywood, Lucy has her hands full with Ricky when he is hailed as a major celebrity. The Ricardos' neighbors join for a grand homecoming celebration and block party in Ricky's honor when the Ricardos and Mertze return together.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky Ricardo's new fame leads to an invitation to appear on a television interview program. The live interview is to take place in their home and Ricky's new agent wants them to move to a more posh apartment.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky cannot help Fred out by performing at his lodge show because he is already booked for a radio show that day. Lucy volunteers to help out so she and Fred whip up a Western act. Ricky discovers it's a rodeo show that he's booked for, not a radio show.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky finds Lucy exhausted after a trying day with little Ricky and insists it is time their son started nursery school. Lucy's protests are overridden and Ricky takes young Ricky to nursery school, but the baby comes down with tonsillitis.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky is offered a European booking that is too important to refuse but he can't afford to take Lucy with him. Lucy is furious at the prospect of being left behind, and when Ricky wants to take Fred Mertz along as the tour manager, Ethel too, is incensed.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy is unable to produce her birth certificate to get a passport for the Ricardos' and Mertzes' European jaunt. She calls her hometown for the birth certificate but discovers that none exists for her.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Fred's fear of becoming seasick threatens the Mertzes' and Ricardos' plans for Ricky's European band tour. They are all booked on the ocean liner Constitution for the trans-Atlantic voyage.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Ricardos and Mertzes are on the deck of the Constitution, ready to set sail for Europe when Lucy rushes down the gangplank for one last goodbye to Little Ricky who will be in her mother's care while she is away.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy anticipates a 2nd honeymoon with Ricky on their boat trip to Europe, but Ricky's band duties keep him too busy. Lucy happily looks forward to romantic evenings and daytime deck games on board the ship as the Ricardos and the Mertzes sail for Europe.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy is thrilled at being in London, and most of all wants to see the Queen. She misses the Queen at Buckingham Palace where she and Ethel try to make the guard smile.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy is jealous after Ricky dances with Angela Randall, an up-and-coming British actress. She gets Ricky away from her by going to the country estate of Sir Clive Richardson, a prominent English film producer, for a fox hunt he is hosting.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Ricardos and Mertzes prepare to leave London for Paris, Lucy realizes that they will not have time to visit her ancestral land of Scotland. She was looking forward to seeking out members of the McGillicuddy clan, her distant relatives.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Equipped with an English-French dictionary, Lucy sets out to explore Paris and discover an artist whose paintings will become very valuable – she knows she has "the eye.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Ricardos and Mertzes, sightseeing in Paris, are sitting at a sidewalk cafe that Charles Boyer is known to frequent. Lucy thinks she has spotted Boyer and turns to jelly, but Ricky convinces her it's a case of mistaken identity.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy goes on a hunger strike in order to get Ricky to buy an expensive dress from a famous French designer. He finally gives in but returns the dress when he discovers that Ethel smuggled her food while on the strike.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Fred, managing Ricky's band while on European tour, routes the musicians to Locarno instead of Lucerne. Ricky is distraught and Lucy suggests a hike in the Alps with the Mertzes to take his mind off his problems.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Fred Mertz, managing Ricky's European band tour, is very concerned over the expense incurred when he misrouted Ricky's band so he books second-class train passage for the overnight trip to Florence and a fourth-class hotel for their stay.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Ricardos and Mertzes are on a train for Rome when Lucy is 'discovered' by an Italian film director who offers her a role in his new picture, "Bitter Grapes".

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Ricardos and Mertzes are leaving Genoa for Nice when Lucy decides they should all go by bicycle because they can't see enough of the countries from the train. Ricky and the Mertzes agree under protest and after an exhausting day of pedaling.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky is working in Monte Carlo, but Fred goofed and bargained for too little money for the engagement. Lucy and Ethel go to the casino to watch, but when Lucy finds a chip that someone dropped and replaces it on the table, it wins and continues to do so.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Ricardos and Mertzes need to return to the United States by plane instead of ship creating problems for Lucy who has bought, among other souvenirs, a 30-pound cheese.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky is opening a new night spot, the Club Babalu, and wants Bob Hope to appear at the grand opening. Lucy fears Hope won't because of her widespread reputation for causing chaos, and wants to reassure him that this time she's butting out.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Although they both agree not to try and influence Little Ricky's future, Lucy buys a toy doctor kit and Ricky gives him a drum set. Their son takes to the drums and begins to play it non-stop for days.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Orson Welles is scheduled to perform for a benefit in Ricky's club. Ricky is worried that Lucy will foul things up if she is around so he decides to send her off to Florida.

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu

programme.title: Queen: Mercury Rising
programme.desc: Freddie Mercury, Brian May, Roger Taylor, and John Deacon, four names synonymous with one of the world's all-time greatest rock bands, Queen.

programme.title: Queen: How They Broke Free
programme.desc: Few bands have ever come close to achieving the same stature of greatness as Queen. Their ability to dominate and amaze audiences was relentless.

programme.title: Rod Stewart: The Signature Voice
programme.desc: His unique voice, presence on stage and dynamic fashion sense has turned Rod into a superstar. Some guys have all the luck, but Rod has persisted, through ups and downs, to remain one of Britain's most notable performers.

programme.title: Rolling Stone: Life And Death Of Brian Jones
programme.desc: Night Flight Presents: Exploring the rise of Brian Jones and the Rolling Stones as well as the untimely death of Jones; Garcia paints an interesting and revealing picture of doomed pop star.

programme.title: Bowie: The Man Who Changed The World
programme.desc: An inside look at David Bowie, one of the most creative and influential rock artists of all time. Featuring exclusive contributions from those who worked with David Bowie and archive interviews with the man himself.

programme.title: Santana: Live At US Festival
programme.desc: From award-winning filmmaker and rockumentarian Glenn Aveni, Santana: Live At US Festival offers a tremendous performance from the legendary Carlos Santana, rivaling his set at Woodstock for its energy, excitement, and inspiring musicianship

programme.title: Sex & Drugs & Rock & Roll
programme.desc: A portrait of British punk rock pioneer Ian Dury who was stricken with polio at a young age and defied expectations by becoming a founder of the punk-rock scene in Britain in the 1970s.

programme.title: Stevie Nicks: Wild at Heart
programme.desc: Through her drive and passion for creating art, the Bohemian Rock Queen found an avenue to overcome her obstacles, going on to become the only woman inducted into the rock and roll hall of fame, twice.

programme.title: Breaking the Band
programme.desc: Aerosmith has truly earned its title as America's greatest rock 'n' roll band.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd TVSP #13: Alcatraz Connection
programme.desc: Master thief Lupin III, gunslinger Jigen and swordmaster Goemon are back for a new caper, this time aboard the casino-ship Machine Gun Kelly. Between the mafia, interpol, and a secret organization based under Alcatraz!

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd TVSP #15: Operation: Return the Treasure
programme.desc: Lupin sets his sights on the legendary Trick Diamond, stolen by his late rival Mark Williams. Instead of finding the diamond, Fujiko relays Mark's dying challenge: return all the other treasures he stole to reveal the location of the gem.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd TVSP #16: Swallowtail Tatoo
programme.desc: A mysterious criminal captures Lupin and Fujiko with a very specific order: in order to save Fujiko's life, Lupin must infiltrate a high-security museum and steal the Bull's Eye jewel. One little problem: the jewel is cursed to kill anyone who steals it.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd TVSP #17: Tactics Of Angels
programme.desc: Lupin faces his toughest opponents yet! Four women known as the Bloody Angels are after the strange metallic sphere he stole from Area 51. To get their hands on potential alien technology, they're willing to do anything.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd TVSP #19: The Elusiveness of the Fog
programme.desc: Lupin's attempt to steal a time machine causes a crazy mishap! Now stuck in ancient Japan, his team and Inspector Zenigata must join forces to get back to their own time. But notorious thief Lupin has enemies everywhere... and everywhen!

programme.title: LUPIN THE 3rd TVSP #20: Sweet Lost Night
programme.desc: Turns out the Magic Lamp is real, and Lupin's found a way to steal it! But this genie has a price: to grant his wish, she demands half his memories.

programme.title: LUPIN THE 3rd TVSP #21: The Last Job
programme.desc: Lupin and his companions have their sights on a Japanese cultural treasure, a priceless Buddha statue. But when a mysterious group of ninja thieves get the jump on them, it might just be the gang's last job!

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 1
programme.desc: The Hida Speedway has been completed and Lupin is looking to take top prize at the first race. The race is actually a trap designed by the Scorpion Gang who are intent on killing Lupin and eliminating all criminal competition.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 1
programme.desc: Fujiko has stolen something from a man named Pycal, and he wants it back. Pycal is a magician who is able to shoot flames from his hands, walk on air, and deflect bullets with ease. Lupin goes up against Pycal in hopes of saving Fujiko.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 10/24/1992: The Toronto Blue Jays take home Canada's first-ever World Series in 1992, beating the Braves 4-3 in Game 6 with a clutch extra-base hit from Dave Winfield in the top of the 11th inning.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 9/8/93: 24-year-old Darryl Kile took the mound against the Mets and put together an impressive performance in his first career no-hitter in the Astros' 7-1 victory.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 10/22/75: Tony Pérez started the Reds' comeback in Game 7, smashing a two-run home run over the Green Monster and onto Lansdowne Street. Jim Burtan scored Ken Griffey in the top of the 9th to break a 3-3 tie and give the Reds their third World Series win.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 9/23/88 - The Yankees headed to the bottom of the 9th down 4-3 to the Red Sox. Rickey Henderson helped orchestrate the tying run and give New York hope. Bases loaded and two outs, Claudell Washington scored the winning run on an error by Jody Reed.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: On Opening Day in 1994, Doc Gooden took on the Cubs at Wrigley Field. The story, however, wasn't about the Mets' 12-8 win. To Cubs fans, it is known as the Tuffy Rhodes Game. Rhodes shocked the Friendly Confines by hitting three homers off Gooden.

programme.title: Merlin's Shop of Mystical Wonders
programme.desc: A grandfather tells his grandson several horrifying stories involving the wizard Merlin and a stolen monkey doll in Merlin's Shop of Mystical Wonders (1996).

programme.title: MST3K Shorts
programme.desc: A band of no-good punks beat a guy for driving too slow and steal his mechanical pencil, before arriving to pick up their missing member Jamie, the son of the man they've just beaten.

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000: Hercules Unchained
programme.desc: While trying to resolve a quarrel between warring brothers Eteocles and Polynices, Hercules is taken captive by Queen Omphale of Lydia.

programme.title: MST3K Shorts
programme.desc: A prank gone wrong leads to children taking on a dangerous new sport.

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000: Hellcats
programme.desc: Joel and the 'bots attempt to puzzle out what's going on in the unintelligible biker film, The Hellcats (1968). Flashbacks from earlier episodes fill out the host segments.

programme.title: MST3K: Zombie Nightmare
programme.desc: A hit-and-run victim is brought back from the dead by a voodoo doctor, and then seeks revenge.

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000: Mitchell
programme.desc: The trio sit through a dreary Joe Don Baker disasterpiece as Gypsy tries to find a way to save Joel from being killed by the Mads.

programme.title: MST3K: The Christmas Dragon
programme.desc: All three hosts watch a group of precocious orphans attempt save a dying Father Christmas in THE CHRISTMAS DRAGON (2014).

programme.title: MST3K: The Bubble
programme.desc: Joel's crew watch as a married couple find themselves trapped in a mysterious town in THE BUBBLE (1966). The test subjects hatch a plan to escape.

programme.title: MST3K: Viking Women And The Sea Serpent
programme.desc: The crew watches an educational short about the wonders a home economics major can do for young women in The Home Economics Story (1951). In The Saga of the Viking Women Sea Serpent (1957), lonely Viking women set sail to rescue a group of enslaved men.

programme.title: Are You The One?
programme.desc: Chris T. jeopardizes the $1 million dollar prize with his inability to move on from Shanley. And when Ryan's journals go missing, he finds comfort in Kayla, who is also finding comfort in Wes.

programme.title: Are You The One?
programme.desc: Tensions explode between Jacy and Simone as both girls fight for John's affections. Things heat up when Brittany and Adam take a trip to the Boom-Boom Room. The challenge reveals embarrassing secrets about the girls' old habits.

programme.title: Are You The One?

programme.title: Are You The One?
programme.desc: Tensions between John and Simone reach a boiling point. Kayla's interest in Wes in renewed even though she is still holding onto Ryan. Spirits are raised when a waterfall challenge sends two couples to the Truth Booth.

programme.desc: The house must decide who has it worst when one single finds himself caught between 2 exes and another is faced with his most dreaded ex. A sexy date turns into total chaos.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers uses objects from his kitchen to make a horse sculpture. Prince Tuesday is dressed in a lion costume and startles Mayor Maggie. He explains that wearing the costume helps him feel brave about looking for his father's crown.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mr. McFeely delivers a video about how people make apple juice. King Friday suggests that Lady Aberlin start looking for his missing crown at the Museum-Go-Round.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers arrives with a fish sculpted from the paper by his friend Ben Gonzales. Edgar Cooke shares with Lady Aberlin that his refrigerator and food are gone. She finds it, along with King Friday's crown and the Westwood sign.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Bill Nye, “the Science Guy” stops by to show a science experiment using baking soda and vinegar to blow up a balloon. Mister Rogers shows a video of dump trucks at a construction site, and in Make-Believe, all that was lost is found.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Magician David Copperfield teaches Mister Rogers how to do a magic trick. It takes lots of practice. In Make-Believe, X is giving flying lessons, and there's a video of what the world looks like from a bird's point of view.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Prince Tuesday is upset about being unable to fly, so Lady Elaine gives him a propeller hat. He jumps off the castle wall, thinking the hat will make him fly, and injures his arm. Mister Rogers visits the Uptown String Quartet.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: X says he is feeling guilty about Prince Tuesday's fall. Neighbor Aber says it was not X's flying lessons that made Prince Tuesday get hurt. Mister Rogers shows a video about people making sleeping bags. He visits the workshop of the doll maker.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Hula-hoop expert Paul Tifford gives Mister Rogers some lessons. It takes a lot of practice to be able to use a hula-hoop well, and falling and getting up again are a part of learning!

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Instead of changing into a sweater as he typically does, Mister Rogers puts on a vest made by his friend Saihou Njie. Trolley brings a batik cloth to Handyman Negri, who then gives it to King Friday.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers arrives with a children's plastic potty, takes it to his bathroom and compares it to the adult-sized toilet. Prince Tuesday comes up with a game using a bucket but has had his feelings hurt when his father was not impressed.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: King Friday denounces the magic finder balloon. Neighbors Aber and Robert Troll are looking for Lady Elaine. They find her locked in a room of the Museum-Go-Round. At Mister Rogers' house, Levar Burton reads “The Daddy Book.”

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers explains how a wheelchair lift works, and then shows one in action. He shows some of his puppets. Mayor Maggie and Neighbor Aber ride in a wheelchair until they have their checkups from Dr. Bill.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits with Koko the gorilla, who has learned how to communicate in sign language. In Make-Believe, there's a gorilla, too, who seems scary until the neighbors get to know him. And there's a video of how people make play balls.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood

programme.desc: Mod Mafia transforms a fire-damaged M1038 Humvee ambulance into an extreme camping overlander; the Wide Open Garage team builds a bulletproof race car for the appropriately billed Death Car Race, in which drivers are blindfolded.

programme.title: Engine Masters
programme.desc: The crew tests the effects of running long vs. short rods on otherwise identical engines; they'll find out if long rods make more torque, if shorter rods' faster swipe makes a difference, or if rod length doesn't actually matter.

programme.title: Dirt Every Day
programme.desc: Fred Williams' garage-find 1961 Willy's Wagon has been sitting with bad brakes and a tired drivetrain ever since a prior engine swap, so it's time to set that straight.

programme.title: Bitchin' Rides
programme.desc: Dave designs a Mustang for the ages to compete in the Optima Challenge; the build includes a new front facia and hood and redesigning the rear end.

programme.title: Iron Resurrection
programme.desc: Facing deadline, the shop struggles to fit a gigantic ex-NFL player into a tiny 1967 Chevy C10 that includes a customized leather interior and automated bed cover.

programme.title: Psycho Intern
programme.desc: A young male intern becomes obsessed with a female project manager after they have a one-night stand.

programme.title: I Know What I Saw
programme.desc: A young woman (Beverley Mitchell) has horrific visions of people's deaths, which may link to a series of unsolved murders.

programme.title: My Life Is a Lifetime Movie
programme.desc: A woman's life is turned upside down when her husband is accused of stealing body parts; a woman marries a man she met online after a whirlwind courtship.

programme.title: Seeds of Yesterday
programme.desc: A flirtatious girl (Sammi Hanratty) maintains a love-hate relationship with her obsessive brother (James Maslow).

programme.title: The Honor List
programme.desc: Four girls sink a time capsule in a lake with a list of things they want to do before graduation, but they all go separate ways before graduating. When a tragedy strikes, they reunite to find the capsule and complete the bucket list.

programme.title: The Perks of Being a Wallflower
programme.desc: Socially awkward Charlie is a wallflower watching from the sidelines, until a pair of charismatic seniors take him under their wing.

programme.title: Measure of a Man
programme.desc: A teen develops a bond with a Wall Street executive while learning to stand up to bullies during one life-changing summer.

programme.title: The Edge of Seventeen
programme.desc: A high school junior (Hailee Steinfeld) develops an unexpected bond with a thoughtful teen (Hayden Szeto) after learning that her best friend (Haley Lu Richardson) is dating her older brother (Blake Jenner).

programme.title: Booksmart
programme.desc: Two high school overachievers decide to cram four years of not-to-be missed fun into one night -- a chaotic adventure that no amount of book smarts could prepare them for.

programme.title: The Spy Who Dumped Me
programme.desc: Unexpectedly thrust into an international conspiracy, two best friends find themselves dodging deadly assassins and a suspicious British agent while hatching a plan to save the world.

programme.title: The Unbearable Weight of Massive Talent
programme.desc: Facing financial ruin, actor Nick Cage accepts $1 million to attend a wealthy fan's birthday party. Taking on the role of a lifetime, he soon finds himself channeling his most iconic and beloved characters to save himself and his loved ones.

programme.title: Mr. Mom
programme.desc: Michael Keaton plays a husband and father who loses his job as an engineer at the auto manufacturing plant. After struggling to find another job, his wife lands a high-paying position at an advertising agency.

programme.title: Drinking Buddies
programme.desc: Luke and Kate are co-workers at a Chicago brewery, where they spend their days drinking and flirting. They’re perfect for each other, except that they’re both in relationships. Luke is in the midst of marriage talks with his girlfriend of six years.

programme.title: Foxy Brown
programme.desc: A blaxploitation film about a woman whose drug-dealing brother ratted on her undercover narcotics-agent boyfriend to the mob and she, in turn, poses as a call girl to infiltrate the mobsters who butchered him.

programme.title: The Last Days on Mars
programme.desc: The crew of the first-ever manned expedition to Mars makes an astounding discovery on the eve of their return to Earth: fossilized evidence of life on Mars. But the scientific discovery of life might be the death of us all.

programme.title: Boondock Saints
programme.desc: Two Irish Catholic brothers become vigilantes and wipe out Boston's criminal underworld in the name of God.

programme.title: Cube²: Hypercube
programme.desc: Eight Strangers wake up in a bizarre cube with no recollection of how they got there. They soon discover that they're in a deadly dimension where the laws of physics don't apply and they must unravel the secrets of the hypercube in order to survive.

programme.title: Apocalypto
programme.desc: As the Mayan kingdom faces its decline, a young man is taken on a perilous journey to a world ruled by fear and oppression.

programme.title: El precio de la historia
programme.desc: Rick visita una galería de arte en el Hotel Venetian para ver las ilustraciones carísimas del clásico libro para niños "Donde viven los monstruos". Mientras tanto, en Gold & Silver, aparece una colección extraordinaria de discos de vinilo de los Beatles.

programme.title: El precio de la historia

programme.desc: La Batalla de Kursk, que enfrentó a los nazis contra los soviéticos, es uno de los verdaderos puntos de inflexión de la Segunda Guerra Mundial.

programme.desc: Es indiscutible que, a pesar de su tecnología supuestamente primitiva, sociedades que florecieron casi 2000 años antes de Cristo, lograron hazañas que cambiaron para siempre la comprensión del mundo.

programme.title: Miradas sin filtro
programme.desc: Caer en la rutina de lo cotidiano nos hace olvidar la autenticidad de lo que nos rodea, creyendo que lo extraordinario se encuentra lejos de nosotros, pero no siempre es así.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: Cuando Clara y su familia se mudan a una pequeña casa en la zona rural de Hinsdale, Nueva York, se dan cuenta de que la paz de la vida en el campo es simplemente una ilusión y que la amenaza de muerte es muy real.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: Cuenta la leyenda que un "fantasma" empujará a cualquiera que se atreva a sentarse en lo alto del mausoleo en el cementerio más antiguo de Wisconsin. Los compañeros de secundaria Nick, Krystian y Jon prueban esta teoría en la noche de Halloween.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: Entre los psíquicos del mundo que afirman poseer habilidades extrasensoriales, los hay quienes dicen que pueden retroceder en el tiempo y ser testigos de acontecimientos del pasado que se desarrollan ante ellos.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: El estrés puede tener efectos poderosos y destructivos. Puede debilitar tanto el cuerpo como la mente, puede deteriorar las relaciones e incluso puede hacer que un alma se vuelva vulnerable a lo sobrenatural.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: Los nuevos comienzos son siempre emocionantes. Pero sin importar cuánto deseemos que ocurran, siempre llegan con cierto grado de ansiedad y dificultad.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: Ciertos mitos nativos norteamericanos hablan de criaturas sobrenaturales que protegen a los muertos. Los primeros exploradores de algunas tribus algonquinas del noreste de los Estados Unidos contaban historias sobre hombres lobo.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: A lo largo de todo Estados Unidos existen millones de cementerios rurales. Algunos están muy mal identificados y, con el paso del tiempo, pueden ser olvidados con facilidad.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: Abril James siempre había soñado con renovar una casa victoriana. Cuando ella y su prometido Matt compran una casa histórica en Salt Lake City, estado de Utah.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: La infancia debería ser una etapa de descubrimiento lúdico y de regocijo inocente. Pero ¿qué sucede cuando las realidades del reino paranormal traspasan sus barreras y despiertan el mal verdadero?

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: Ron y Nancy están convencidos de que su nuevo hogar es demasiado bueno para ser verdad: la histórica casa Baltimore se adapta de forma ideal a su presupuesto, y además, es tan grande como para alojar a su gran familia.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: Deb y Tony acaban de comenzar su vida juntos. Con su primer hijo en camino, la pareja trabajadora se muda a una pintoresca casa en Atchison, en el estado de Kansas, con muchas esperanzas para el futuro.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: La fe es una fuerza poderosa. Puede proporcionar fuerza a los débiles, puede calmar los mares más tempestuosos. Pero, para la mayoría de las personas, la fe brinda respuestas que pueden ayudar a darle sentido a un mundo caótico.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: La casa de rancho de Ed y Beth parece el lugar perfecto para criar a su niño pequeño hasta que descubren que no están solos, y una espesa niebla oscura se cierne sobre la casa y crece día a día.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: En la ciudad de Springfield, estado de Illinois, el Lake Club es un monumento a una época pasada: un salón de baile donde multitud de personas alguna vez prosperaron, acompañados de los sonidos del jazz clásico.

programme.title: Africa, la más salvaje.
programme.desc: Ngorongoro, que se cree que se formó hace unos 2,5 millones de años a partir de una gran implosión volcánica, es ahora una tierra fértil llena de fauna y flora silvestres.

programme.title: Iconos de vida silvestre: Conoce los suricatos
programme.desc: Este documental se desarrolla en el poderoso desierto de Kalahari de Sudáfrica. Sigue a una familia de suricatas gregarias por un día, dirigida por una hembra dominante.

programme.title: Descubriendo el mundo
programme.desc: Jerusalén es una ciudad santa para judíos, cristianos y musulmanes, y cada uno tiene su piedra sagrada aquí: el Muro de los Lamentos, la Piedra del Santo Sepulcro y la Roca debajo de la famosa cúpula de oro.

programme.title: Descubriendo el mundo
programme.desc: Este es un retrato real de Mayotte, una isla donde los pequeños pueblos viven en paz con costumbres ancestrales y donde abunda la creatividad de la naturaleza.

programme.title: Sobrevivir en la naturaleza
programme.desc: Aprende las astutas tácticas que los animales utilizan para establecer jerarquías, asegurar recursos, ganar territorio y seducir a sus parejas.

programme.title: Los Casagrande
programme.desc: Héctor finalmente se une al equipo de fútbol de sus sueños. Mientras preparan bao para la Feria Cultural China, Sid y Adelaide se enfrentan a bandidos que viejan en el tiempo.

programme.title: Los Casagrande
programme.desc: Sergio solicita la ayuda de Adelaide para convertirse en un caballero y recuperar a Priscilla. Rosa escucha una predicción de Ernesto Estrella de que María y Arturo podrían volver a estar juntos.

programme.title: Los Casagrande
programme.desc: Cuando Carl lleva el "truco o trato" demasiado lejos, debe devolver sus dulces al duende del vecindario.

programme.title: Los Casagrande
programme.desc: Ronnie Anne y sus amigos reclutan a Carlos X como su entrenador en un skate-off contra Tony Hawk. No aguantando más a los matones en la escuela, Alexis aprende algo de Carl.

programme.title: Los Casagrande
programme.desc: El sueño de Bobby de tocar en una banda finalmente podría hacerse realidad, pero debe juntarse con los amigos punk de Par. Preocupado por no estar a la altura de sus geniales amigos, Sameer intenta batir un récord de credibilidad callejera.

programme.title: Los Casagrande
programme.desc: Planeando la quinceañera de Ronnie Anne, Rosa decide entrenarla durante los próximos tres años. Carlos mete a Carl en el ajedrez para evitar que se meta en problemas, pero Carl se toma literal el gobierno del reino.

programme.title: Los Casagrande
programme.desc: Los Casagrande celebran la boda de Paco, pero necesitan encontrar las arras que Sergio perdió.

programme.title: Los Casagrande
programme.desc: Héctor rechaza la oferta de Rosa de unirse a su clase de baile, pero rápidamente se pone celoso de su talentosa instructora.

programme.title: Los Casagrande
programme.desc: Adelaide y Carl luchan para ganar las insignias de guardianes del zoológico, pero su pelea podría arruinar las oportunidades de ambos. Héctor descubre que Vito tiene una cuenta enorme en el mercado y Vito se ofrece a devolverle el dinero.

programme.title: Los Casagrande
programme.desc: Ronnie Anne está nerviosa por volver a subirse a su tabla después de una mala caída. Un artefacto poderoso está llegando al museo de Great Lakes City y trae consigo una tormenta para los Casagrande.

programme.title: Los Casagrande
programme.desc: Cuando el trabajo del Sr. Chang podría ir a parar a un conductor de tren más rápido, tiene que demostrar que puede ser igual de rápido. Adelaida quiere ayudar a los gatos de la ciudad a limpiar sus actos para ser adoptados.

programme.title: Los Casagrande
programme.desc: Arturo lleva a Bobby al bosque para enseñarle técnicas de supervivencia. Frida le pide a Carlota que pase un día con ella en el spa.

programme.title: Los Casagrande
programme.desc: Bobby y Par deben resistirse a los tesoros de la tienda. La familia intenta evitar que Hector propague rumores.

programme.title: Los Casagrande
programme.desc: Una niña de 11 años se adapta a su nueva vida en compañía de su familia mexicano-estadounidense, la cual regenta un mercado que abastece de productos a todo el barrio.

programme.title: Los Casagrande
programme.desc: Ronnie Anne consigue la pasantía de su vida con Bruno. Carl sueña con participar en el espectáculo de medio tiempo en un partido de los Gatos y se infiltra con Alexis y la banda escolar.

programme.title: Los Casagrande
programme.desc: Ronnie Anne y Bobby tienen que soportar a un viejo amigo de Arturo, Beto la Alpaca, pero él tiene otros planes. El abuelo ayuda CJ a construir un cohete, pero tiene que mentirle cuando todo sale mal, para que no pierda la fe en él.

programme.title: Los Casagrande

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Dra confesses to his girlfriend Chance that he had a one-night stand with his best friend's girlfriend. Jennifer admits to cheating on her fiancé with his best friend.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Penny busted her super-sized husband, Chris, and her cousin, Christy, together. Next Rovin is here to confront her best friend for sleeping with Chucky, Robin's boyfriend. But Chucky shocks both women when he introduces them to his new lover, Arthur!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Deuce is here to finally come clean to his wife and tell her that he's been sleeping with their friend. Next Debbie is about to find out that her boyfriend, Chris, is more than just friends with his friend Cory!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Monique wants to prove that Chris attacked her when he gave her a ride home after a party. But Chris denies any wrongdoing and says Monique was too drunk to know what happened.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Korey says his girlfriend Dominique is a cheater and his suspicions about her job has caused major problems in their relationship. Then, Gregory thinks that his girlfriend Robin is unfaithful!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Sherronda and Derrick are back! He's accusing her of cheating with his best friend of 40 years, Leslie! Next, Amanda admitted to cheating on Eli a few months ago, but now suspects Eli of doing the same to even the score!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: William received a strange voicemail and became convinced that his girlfriend Jo was drugging him and sneaking men into their house to cheat. Plus, Donovan believes Lacara has been cheating, but she says she confessed so the accusations would stop!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Look What You Did to Your Baby
programme.desc: Kristy wants her baby back from her mother Donna! Donna claims she took the baby away because he was born with severe disabilities due to Kristy’s drug use during pregnancy. Who’s the liar?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Javon says her sister's man Chris, is cheating, but Chris claims Javon is lying out of jealousy! Next, Lindsay says her husband Brandon admitted to cheating throughout their marriage, but now he's accusing her of the same!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Katie and Dave have been together for the last 3 years. However, Dave is still married to a woman named Pam. Now Katie is claiming that Pam has been stalking her as well as causing her physical harm.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Nye and her boyfriend spent last Easter with her family, but he spent most of it drinking and ignoring her until he left without a trace. Where was he that night? Plus, Jackie admitted to cheating on her boyfriend, but he believes there was more!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Avonte was diagnosed with cancer that had him hospitalized for almost a year. His aunt, Terceira, started a fundraiser to help. But now Avonte and his mother are saying that they never received any money and they believe that Terceira kept it.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Alex doesn't think he's the father of Halie's baby girl because he suspects she's unfaithful. Next, Kenchada has been on a revenge spree since Armando cheated on her 4 years ago. Can these relationships be saved?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: At 13 years old, Meghan had issues with alcohol and is now into harder drugs. Then, Raven claims she lost her virginity to Joe and hasn't slept with anyone else, but Joe has heard rumors that he's not the only person she slept with.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: I’m 14 and I Want a Baby
programme.desc: Shalonda is here to tell her mother, Shondra and Steve that she’s ready to have a baby!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Shawn proposed to Nicole after she said she was carrying his baby but refused to show him any proof and then claimed a miscarriage. Next, Kamesha believed Derrick was the one but began to doubt his fidelity. Will these couples make it to the altar?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Pam suffered two miscarriages from the stress of her boyfriend Miguel's cheating accusations. Felisha confessed to cheating on her boyfriend Natron, but Natron denies fathering her two kids. The truth shall set some of these guests free!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Who’s responsible for toddler Noel's well-being? Everyone may deny the allegations, but someone knows what happened, and Steve is getting answers!

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Dashawn y su mamá afirman que lo de Monica fue una aventura de una sola vez y que él no puede ser el padre de su bebé. Entonces, April quiere averiguar quién es el padre de su bebé. Después, ¿Frederick o Jason es el padre del bebé de Marietta?

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Maury está celebrando las fiestas contando cuentos junto a la chimenea. Compartirá las historias de los antiguos invitados que vinieron a hacerse pruebas de paternidad, al detector de mentiras y más. ¡Averigua si estos invitados han sido buenos o malos!

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Después de hacer 5 pruebas de ADN, Rebecca regresa con 2 hombres más para encontrar al padre de su nuevo bebé. Después, Don y su esposa se alegraron al descubrir que su hijo no era el padre del bebé de Jessica, pero ella cree que Don es el padre.

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Don y Amy contrataron a Jessica para cuidar a su hijo, Steven. Años más tarde, Jessica dice que Steven es el padre de su hijo. Además, Marisol ha hecho 16 pruebas de ADN para encontrar al padre de su hijo. ¿La prueba número 17 será la definitiva?

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Charlotte y Tasheun se acercaron por el padre de sus hijos en común, Brandon, en un álbum fotográfico, pero ¿la prueba de ADN lo confirmará? Luego, ¿probará Tanya que su bebé Craig III es el hijo de Craig Jr.?

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: ¿Probará Katrina, de 25 años, que Christopher, de 50 años, es el padre de su bebé y callará a su nueva novia, Suprina? ¿El padre del bebé de Sarah es Johnny o un hombre casado? Además, Robert niega ser padre de los bebés de dos mujeres.

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: ¡Brittany cree que Dionte es el padre de su bebé y lo demostrará! Después, Melissa, de 24 años, afirma que Rob, de 47 años, es el padre de su bebé, ¡pero la hija de Rob quiere pruebas!

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Tammy sospecha que su marido Johnnie se acuesta con Renee y que Robert escucha a su hermana y le es infiel a su prometida adolescente Raven. Además, ¿Tom se acostó con la esposa de su mejor amigo?

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: ¿El prometido de Tiffany, Deon, dejó embarazada a su mejor amiga lesbiana? Después, William cree que sus 2 de sus 6 hijos con su ex-esposa Nicole no son suyos y puede ser el padre del hijo de otra mujer! ¡Nuestras pruebas de ADN nos revelan la verdad!

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Estas madres están desesperadas por encontrar a los padres desaparecidos de sus hijos. Pero estos padres que niegan que son los verdaderos padres y dicen que es imposible que lo sean.

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Estos invitados dicen que están seguros de saber quién es el padre de sus hijos, pero necesitan una prueba de ADN para comprobarlo. Ahora los resultados están a punto de descubrirse, pero ¿serán los resultados que esperaban?

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Estas parejas decidieron hacer un trío que terminó en un embarazo. Ahora que los bebés han nacido, estos hombres niegan ser los padres. Hoy se verán obligados a reconocer la verdad.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: La familia de Jackie no confía en su novio cuando está con sus hijos, pero ella insiste en seguir con él. ¿Qué horrible verdad revelará la prueba del detector de mentiras de Shaqualla sobre su novio?

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Katrina cree que el novio de su hermana Kendra es un infiel y que tiene sexo con su mejor amiga, Nay-Nay. Después, John vuelve al escenario con algo sorprendente.

programme.title: Amor comprado
programme.desc: Hilario y Mariana intentan que Ricky no se dé cuenta de que su mamá y su abuela están borrachas, pero no lo logran. Mariana libera a Hilario y Ricky de toda culpa.

programme.title: Amor comprado
programme.desc: Para disgusto de Margot, Willy invita a Mariana y Martin a una cena para celebrar el cobro de la herencia y molestar a Gertrudis. Morgana inventa un encuentro con una amiga y Luciano le entrega las llaves de la caja fuerte.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Tras dar con el paradero de Rosaura, Luis Mario la conduce a la hacienda Arismendi.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Eva se aprovecha del conflicto existente entre Rosaura y Patricio para tensar aún más la situación con Rosaura, al amenazarla con revelarle a Patricio lo de su embarazo.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Gabriel acosa a Eva con su amenaza de desenmascarar ante Luis Mario la dudosa situación sobre su paternidad del recién nacido hijo de Eva. Camelia llena de intrigas la cabeza de Rosaura.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje

programme.title: Acorralada
programme.desc: Diana va a la casa de Octavia para reclamarle por todos sus actos contra su familia. Octavia y Bruna intentan humillarla, pero se llevan una sorpresa ante la nueva actitud de Diana.

programme.title: Acorralada
programme.desc: Diana toma el puesto de su madre temporalmente en la fábrica y es bienvenida por sus trabajadores con un mensaje que la deja desconcertada.

programme.title: Acorralada
programme.desc: Maximiliano le agradece nuevamente a Camila todas las atenciones que tiene para con él, pero ella aprovecha para besarlo y pedirle que se quede con ella.

programme.title: Amor comprado

programme.title: Ivory Hecker Tonight
programme.desc: Ivory Hecker Tonight is an uncensored political news talk show that prioritizes filling in the blanks when politicians and media outlets lie through omission. Ivory prioritizes curiosity and citizen questions over loyalty to any political party.

programme.title: Fine Point With Chanel Rion
programme.desc: Chanel Rion leads bold and uncensored discourse on Big Tech, Big Media, and Big Government. From thought leaders to world leaders, join Chanel as she pierces through the scripts, and reads between the lies. Weeknights on OAN.

programme.title: Real America With Dan Ball
programme.desc: Dan Ball brings the latest political headlines by interviewing news makers of the day, including politicians, lawmakers, pundits, celebrities and social media influencers.

programme.title: Tipping Point With Kara McKinney
programme.desc: Tipping Point" gives informative and meaningful discussions from all sides of the political spectrum, to get on point with the issues that matter most.

programme.title: One America News

programme.title: Storage Wars: Texas

programme.title: Storage Wars: Texas

programme.title: Storage Wars: Texas
programme.desc: Arlington has the Texas buyers on the lookout. Ricky and Bubba play up their country roots in an attempt to juke the competition. Lesa treads on a snakeskin ensemble. And Victor goes after a scooter with a three thousand dollar potential.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Texas

programme.title: Storage Wars: Texas

programme.title: Storage Wars: Texas

programme.title: Storage Wars: Texas

programme.title: Storage Wars: Texas

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: Beckett begins experimenting with a new treatment that could turn the Wraiths into humans. The team finds a young Wraith girl, who could be Beckett's first patient. Having been raised by a human, the girl is eager, and reckless, to try anything.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: Destiny discovers the survivors of an interplanetary expedition who claim their civilization, Novus, was founded two thousand years earlier by Destiny’s crew. Suddenly, they are attacked by the Drones who have discovered a way to track Destiny.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: Returning the settlers to their home planet Novus, the Destiny crew discover the planet has been abandoned and is on the verge of seismic destruction. While pouring through an underground archive, the crew learns of the true origins of Novus.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: When Destiny’s attempt to recharge in a star is foiled by attacking drones, Eli suggests a risky plan to recharge in a super-hot blue giant…a star so hot it could destroy the ship…unless someone stays aboard and keeps the ship under manual control.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: After a battle, Destiny’s only option for survival is a jump to the next galaxy. Crew members return to Earth to say what may be their final farewells before embarking on their journey. But a risky stop may put the entire plan in jeopardy.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: A truce is declared among the Goa'uld, so that the warlords can attend a summit on the future of universe domination. As Jackson speaks fluent Goa'uld, he is sent to the summit disguised as an aide. But his real mission is to poison the delegates!

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Embattled and under siege, SG-1 attempts to escape a Goa'uld search and destroy mission bent on finding them and the secret crystal they carry. Meanwhile, the balance of life is threatened by the reappearance of the evil System Lord Anubis.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: As an asteroid hurtles toward Earth, SG-1 uses an abandoned Goa'uld ship as a launch pad for a mega-bomb designed to destroy the rock before impact. But when SGC loses the ship's signal, it's feared that the team is dead and that Earth is in peril.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: K'tano, former First Prime of the late Imhotep, is now the leader of a powerful Jaffa rebellion. SG-1 visits his stronghold in hopes of securing an alliance. But O'Neill soon learns that this strategic partnership may well come at a heavy price.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: A dormant female android discovered on a barren planet is transported back to Earth for study. On reactivation, she exhibits a childlike innocence. But soon, SG-1 discovers that this seemingly innocent being may hold a dangerous secret.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Col. O'Neill (Richard Dean Anderson) must enlist the aid of a couple of convicted felons in a bid to save a planet from the Goa'uld. With an attack looming, an entire world's salvation rests in the hands of SG-1 and two former NID operatives.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Exposed to a lethal dose of radiation, Jackson has just hours to live. SG-1 tries everything in its power to save him, but as the hours tick away, Jackson's spirit meets with each member individually to discuss his next mission: life after death.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1

programme.title: Hot in Cleveland

programme.title: Everybody Hates Chris

programme.title: Everybody Hates Chris

programme.title: Everybody Hates Chris
programme.desc: Chris and his family decide to take a trip down South to attend the funeral of Julius' distant relative.

programme.title: Caroline in the City

programme.title: Caroline in the City

programme.title: Hot in Cleveland

programme.desc: PacWorld is under siege by ghosts and there is little Pac-Man can do about it without fresh berries from the Tree Of Life, which is hidden somewhere in the Netherworld and guarded not only by legions of ghosts, but fierce monsters!

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: When Pac and friends keep defeating all his ghosts, Betrayus, with the help of the demented Dr. Buttocks, decides to clone an army of Netherworld monsters. Lucky for Pac, one little monster isn't really a monster at heart.

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: Dr. Buttocks amps up the stakes by inventing the Molecular Magnifier to create gigantic Monsters. Meanwhile, Pac adopts the little monster that saved his life, but he's in for more trouble than he bargained for.

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: Lord Betrayus plans to render Pac powerless – by getting Inky, Blinky, Pinky and Clyde to feed Pac so much he'll be too full to eat anything else... power berries or ghosts! But Pac isn't getting full, even when he's eating everything in both worlds!

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: Pac and his pals grow suspicious when President Spheros starts behaving strangely. They eventually realize that Spheros has been possessed. Unfortunately, he declares Pac and pals Public Enemies and puts out a city wide Pac-Man-Hunt!

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: Pac gets a huge zit right before Class Picture Day. The more stressed Pac gets about it, the more zits appear, so Betrayus sends his meanest-mouthed ghosts to stress him to the breaking point - or in this case - popping point!

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: When Pac and his pals get blasted into the past, he not only finally meets his parents -- and his Baby Pac self – but has an adventure with them during PacWorld War I.

programme.desc: When Sonic and the gang win an award for being role models, it comes with a price that keeps them from doing their jobs as heroes. / While the rest of the village is celebrating New Year's Eve, Eggman decides to slow down time.

programme.title: Sonic Boom
programme.desc: When Tails' workshop is destroyed by a fire, Sonic, Knuckles, and Amy each have conflicting versions of how it happened. / Something is wrong with Tails! It turns out he has a crush on one of the villagers.

programme.title: Sonic Boom
programme.desc: The gang decides to ride out a big storm at Amy's house. / When Sonic, Tails, and Knuckles think Amy and Sticks are being brainwashed by their boy band heartthrob, the guys go undercover to investigate — by forming a boy band of their own.

programme.title: Sonic Boom
programme.desc: Because of his robots, Eggman is in trouble with the Home Owners' Association that has jurisdiction over his lair. / Knuckles tries to make amends for a past misdeed, but he only succeeds at making things worse.
